case_title: JI HYUNG YI VS. GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YI, JI HYUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. $3,975.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,065.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YI, JI HYUNG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YI, JI HYUNG AS TO DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ON DEC-03-2015 - DENIED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
